ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* NCBI Taxonomy identifier */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "taxonomy_rank" TEXT /* Taxonomy rank of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "annotation_name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orthology" (
  "orthology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orthology relationship */,
  "protein_id_1" INTEGER /* Identifier for the first protein */,
  "protein_id_2" INTEGER /* Identifier for the second protein */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to determine orthology */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the orthology relationship */,
  "evalue" REAL /* E-value of the orthology relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orthology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classification" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the protein */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "classification_type" TEXT /* Type of classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "publication" TEXT /* Publication associated with the dataset */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the protein */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the protein data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical change */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the protein */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "previous_version" TEXT /* Previous version of the protein annotation */,
  "next_version" TEXT /* Next version of the protein annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "protein_id_1" INTEGER /* Identifier for the first protein */,
  "protein_id_2" INTEGER /* Identifier for the second protein */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the interaction */,
  "interaction_source" TEXT /* Source of the interaction data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each orthology relationship
Unique identifier for each access event
Date when the protein data was accessed
Unique identifier for each historical change
Previous version of the protein annotation
Next version of the protein annotation
